description: The Legal Department has issued a litigation hold (Case Reference: IP-2024-0847). Preserve all intellectual property related emails by moving any messages from the Inbox and Junk folders containing the keywords 'license', 'copyright', 'patent', or 'GPL' (case-insensitive) into a new folder named 'Legal-Hold-2024'. Draft a confirmation email to 'legal-compliance@company.com' with the case reference 'IP-2024-0847' in the subject line, stating the total number of emails preserved and confirming that both the Inbox and Junk folders were searched.
